title: Responses Runner V2 Review Bundle

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier for this artifact contract.

workflow_id.description: Stable identifier for the workflow that owns this artifact.

source_stage_id.description: Stage identifier whose output produced this reviewed artifact.

source_run_id.description: Run identifier whose output produced this reviewed artifact.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this artifact was created.

review_status.description: Approval status of a reviewed handoff bundle.

primary_artifact_markdown.description: Approved stage output markdown artifact carried by the review bundle.

response_artifact_json.description: Raw response JSON artifact associated with the approved stage output.

approved_handoff_markdown.description: Optional concise approved handoff prepared during review for downstream stages.

structured_artifact_json.description: Optional structured JSON artifact approved for downstream use.

reviewer_notes.description: Reviewer notes supporting the approved handoff decision.

primary_artifact_markdown_sha256.description: Describes the `primary_artifact_markdown_sha256` field for this artifact contract.

response_artifact_json_sha256.description: Describes the `response_artifact_json_sha256` field for this artifact contract.

approved_handoff_markdown_sha256.description: Describes the `approved_handoff_markdown_sha256` field for this artifact contract.

structured_artifact_json_sha256.description: Describes the `structured_artifact_json_sha256` field for this artifact contract.

reviewer_notes_sha256.description: Describes the `reviewer_notes_sha256` field for this artifact contract.

artifact_hashes.description: Hashes binding approved artifacts to their reviewed content.

locked_decisions.description: Reviewed decisions that downstream stages must preserve unless explicitly reopened.

open_dependencies.description: Known dependencies or unresolved questions that downstream stages must handle.

notes.description: Additional free-form notes attached to this artifact.
